function getTimeAgo(date){const now=new Date();const secondsAgo=Math.floor((now-date)/1000);if(secondsAgo<60)return'Just now';if(secondsAgo<3600)return`${Math.floor(secondsAgo/60)}m ago`;if(secondsAgo<86400)return`${Math.floor(secondsAgo/3600)}h ago`;if(secondsAgo<604800)return`${Math.floor(secondsAgo/86400)}d ago`;return date.toLocaleDateString();}
